title: Little Garden Opens a Path
description: On pages 21–23, little garden opens a path as the battle on Little Garden closes with the giants’ pride restored and the Straw Hats preparing to leave the ancient island.
scene: Little Garden Opens a Path. The battle on Little Garden closes with the giants’ pride restored and the Straw Hats preparing to leave the ancient island. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Well... I suppose that's true if you want to get technical...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: But I really did finish him for sure just now.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: So there's really no need for further pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just head for Alabasta straight away then.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This will be the last time I contact you by Dender-mushi.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I can't afford the Marines to intercept any of our calls.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: from herein, all orders shall be delivered the traditional way.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: His orders are to lie in wait amidst the route between Alabama and little garden,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I still have more than enough capable officers... do you really wish to talk back to me?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: No, no. I'll carry out your orders at once...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So what the hell were these things?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: CPT. Smoker! We've just intercepted a highly peculiar call!

summary: This part centers on little garden opens a path, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
